profile.title: My profile
profile.intro: Update your contact and address details. Submitted changes go through committee review before they go live. Name and identity changes are admin-only.
profile.pendingDescription: You have {{count}} change(s) awaiting committee approval ({{sections}}). New edits in those sections will queue behind it.

contact.submitHint: Changes go live after committee approval.
contact.pendingDescription: A previous change to your contact details is still awaiting review.

address.pendingDescription: A previous change to your address is still awaiting review.

photo.tooLarge: Photo must be smaller than 10 MB.

header.namesAdminOnly: Name and identity changes are admin-only. Contact your committee to update them.

notifications.intro: The system picks the best channel available (WhatsApp > SMS > email) by default. Set a preferred channel below to override. Each notification type can be muted independently. Updates are written to a server-side audit log even when delivery is in log-only mode.

commitmentDue.title: Commitment installment due
commitmentDue.description: Reminder 3 days before each installment due date.

qhStateChanged.title: Qarzan Hasana updates
qhStateChanged.description: When your loan moves between approval / disbursement states.

eventReminder.title: Event reminders
eventReminder.description: 24 hours before each event you are confirmed for.
